title: Trois jours à vivre
writer: Michel Audiard, Guy Bertret, Gilles Grangier
actors: Daniel Gélin, Jeanne Moreau, Lino Ventura
plot: Simon Belin is an actor touring the provinces with his company. Although talented he has never been given the opportunity to shine on stage. It is always Bérimont, a matinée idol past his best, who gets the lead roles. One day how...
